creator: arved@FreeBSD.org
text:
>


>  On Sat, Oct 07, 2006 at 04:29:11PM +0000, M de Wit wrote:
>
>> Building mplayer gives me following error:
>>
>> ===>   mplayer-0.99.8_5 depends on shared library: vga.1 - not found
>> ===>    Verifying install for vga.1 in /usr/ports/graphics/svgalib
>> ===>  svgalib-1.4.3_5 is only for i386, and you are running amd64..
>> *** Error code 1

Mplayer builds fine if you disable svgalib support via OPTIONS.

regards
tilman
